sourceMovie.title: Event Horizon
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Event Horizon (1997) as a horror theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The horror and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Life
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Event Horizon clicked for you, Life (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and science fiction, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Event Horizon?
faq.answer: Try Life, The Thing, The Thing—each shares DNA with Event Horizon while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Event Horizon?
faq.answer: Event Horizon (1997) is best described as Horror, Science Fiction, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Event Horizon worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
